name: llm-lens
description: Local debugging proxy and web UI for inspecting LLM API traffic.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @llm-lens/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @llm-lens/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @llm-lens/shared && npm run build --workspace @llm-lens/backend && node scripts/patch-built-imports.mjs && npm run build --workspace @llm-lens/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @llm-lens/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @llm-lens/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @llm-lens/frontend
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build
